title: Understanding Bordeaux: left vs right bank
description: A deep dive into what separates the Cabernet-dominant Left Bank from the Merlot-dominant Right Bank, covering soils, climate, and key appellations.

title: Burgundy's Grand Cru hierarchy explained
description: From Bourgogne Régionale to Grand Cru — how the Burgundy classification system works and what it means for the wine in the glass.

title: Wine regions of France
description: Overview map of all major French wine regions.

title: WSET L3 SAT tasting grid
description: The Systematic Approach to Tasting grid as used in the WSET Level 3 examination. Print and use for practice tastings.
